title: reimaria fascicularis
intro: Reimaria fascicularis, also known as the coral tree, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Reimaria fascicularis include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Reimaria fascicularis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
